title: Facelift Reborn
description: An up to date version of https://modrinth.com/mod/facelift
body:
This mod provides features and quality of life improvements for Faceland RPG.

For more information about the server, visit https://face.land/

# Combat Enhancements
**Instant Bow/Pistol Zoom:** Speed up your bow and pistol zoom for faster targeting.

**Combat Timer:** Know exactly when you'll leave combat with a clear timer.

**DPS Meter:** Track your damage output with real-time stats.

**Spell Cooldown Display:** Visualize cooldowns with stylish circular indicators.

**Spell Toggle Display:** Easily see when spells are toggled on or off.

**Improved Spell Casting**: Sling out spells as smoothly as ever before.

**Special Enemy Highlighting:** Tagged Enemies (Bejeweled, etc.) are shown with a colored outline to highlight them.

# Inventory & Equipment Management
**Rarity Color Display:** Instantly identify item rarities with color highlights.

**Inventory Searchbar:** Quickly find items with a searchable inventory.

**Equipment Comparison:** Compare gear side by side with dual tooltips.

**AutoTool:** Automatically equip the right tool or weapon when needed.

**Custom Hotbar:** Completely redesigned the spells and hotbar interface.

**Spell-Safe Scrolling:** Glide through your hotbar- no accidental spellcasting.

**Instant Potion:** Drink potions instantly without switching off your weapon.

# Movement & Perspective
**Mount Perspective:** Seamlessly switch to 3rd person when mounting and back to 1st when unmounting.

**Mount Hotkey:** Quickly mount or dismount with a single key press.

# Miscellaneous
**XP Display:** Track your XP gains in a cleaner way.

**Custom Status Effects:** Display unique effects like Curse Stacks and Well Rested.

**Arena Timer:** Keep track of your wave and total time in arenas.

Escape Bar: Watch your progress while you are escaping.
